pr.title: Atlas v1.1: capability click-through evidence trail (read-only)
pr.description:
## Summary

Makes the BHV-036/037 promotion history visible: clicking a capability card in the Atlas now expands a newest-first intake trail instead of only the latest state.

- `_capability_states` now keeps **all** intake reports per capability (sorted by mtime + `created_at`) and emits a `trail` list (capped at `TRAIL_LIMIT = 25`, `decision_counts` still cover everything). Each `_trail_entry` is a compact view: decision, quality verdict, beforeâ†’after `{confidence_level, readiness, score}`, `state_changed`, and â€” when present â€” the BHV-036 `promotion: {raw_level, effective_level, clamped}` audit. Reports predating #62 have no `promotion` field â†’ rendered as absent, never fabricated.
- Viewer: capability cards are clickable (`N intake(s) â–ľ` hint); the trail renders each intake as `decision Â· verdict Â· level/readiness â†’ level/readiness` with score movement, short intake id, timestamp, and an amber `clamped (raw X â†’ effective Y)` marker when the ladder clamped. The first-post-damping drop (`very_high/ready â†’ medium/provisional`, 1.0 â†’ 0.5) reads directly off the trail.
- `ATLAS_SCHEMA_VERSION` 1.0 â†’ 1.1.

**Unchanged:** read-only/local-first boundaries (viewer only reads intake reports; writes remain the two gitignored files under `artifacts/atlas/`), static-snapshot serve behavior, bubble graph, evidence-summaries panel, all promotion/confidence semantics (viewer-only change â€” no ledger entry).

## Tests

Tier 2: `tests/test_atlas.py` â€” 10 passed (2 new: chronological newest-first trail incl. promotion audit + no-fabrication for pre-#62 reports; trail cap with full decision counts). Ruff clean on changed files. `testing-atlas-ui` SKILL updated in the same PR. Browser verification to follow as a PR comment.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
